lanes.name: prototype-acceptance-gates
lanes.objective: Define and implement a prototype acceptance command that evaluates migration outputs against explicit KPI thresholds.
deliverables: Add deterministic acceptance evaluation module and report schema driven by configurable KPI thresholds
Add CLI command (or migrate-e2e follow-up command) that reads migration summary artifacts and emits pass/fail verdict
Include checks for fidelity risks, unsupported event coverage risk, and unresolved transaction adapter readiness signals
Add unit tests for acceptance pass/fail scenarios and deterministic report output

lanes.name: real-sample-baseline-diff
lanes.objective: Enable baseline snapshot and delta comparison for real-sample regression outputs so KPI movement is measurable between rounds.
deliverables: Add script/workflow to persist round baseline summary snapshots from real-sample regression outputs
Add deterministic baseline diff report with regressions/improvements by stage and risk trend dimensions
Support strict failure when key KPIs regress beyond configured tolerances
Document baseline lifecycle and artifact paths in README/USER_MANUAL

lanes.name: preview-host-prototype-smoke
lanes.objective: Improve generated-screen inspectability with repeatable preview-host smoke evidence for prototype review.
deliverables: Add preview-host smoke command/report that validates all generated screen modules are present and route-resolvable
Emit a deterministic preview evidence artifact (screen list, route paths, unresolved module count)
Integrate smoke evidence into user-visible verification flow without breaking existing commands
Add tests and update user docs for how to run and interpret preview smoke evidence
